data.about:
I build engineering teams and systems that turn startup ideas into scalable reality.
8+ years ago, I wrote my first production API. Today, I lead engineering teams across continents, architect AI-powered platforms, and have shipped products serving 100K+ users.

What I bring to the table:
→ Engineering Leadership: Built and scaled 6+ engineering teams. I hire well, mentor deliberately, and create cultures where engineers do their best work.
→ Technical Depth: From HIPAA-compliant healthcare systems to real-time AI agents, I stay hands-on where it matters. Python, Django, React, Next.js, AWS, Azure — I've shipped production systems with all of them.
→ AI/LLM Expertise: Currently deep in the AI space — building RAG pipelines, LLM integrations, and intelligent automation for  
enterprise applications.
→ Research Background: Published researcher with 389+ citations in AI & Computer Vision (Applied Sciences, MDPI).

My team's ship. On time. With quality.

If you're building something ambitious and need an engineering leader who can translate vision into production — let's talk.
📍 Lahore, Pakistan | Dubai

📅 cal.com/abdullahmujahidali
data.company_description:
Our Why: Through our software-products we empower the dreamers, the makers & the doers of society to architect a fuller and more vibrant world.

Our How: We empower businesses, organizations, teams, and individuals by creating value-driven cloud-based-software-products that are artfully designed, user-centric, secure, scalable, and available anywhere.

Our What: We create tools, platforms and products that reshape the way you get things done. It transforms the way you store, view and interact with your data to take your businesses, teams, and organizations to new heights of efficiency and productivity.

educations.school: University of Management and Technology - UMT

experiences.description:
• Architected microservices using Django/FastAPI that improved system reliability by 45% and supported 100K+ daily active users across multiple products.

• Pioneered the company's first AI initiatives, implementing solutions using LangGraph and AWS Bedrock that transformed workflows for medical and educational clients.

• Led a team of 4 developers in building AI-powered features that reduced manual work by 40% and improved data processing accuracy by 25%.

• Implemented RabbitMQ for asynchronous processing that improved throughput by 25% and better handled traffic spikes.

• Refactored frontend that cut load times by 40% and helped increase conversion rates by 12%.

• Enhanced payment processing with Stripe, implementing validation routines that reduced fraudulent transactions by 15%.

• Trained engineering teams on AI technologies and successfully delivered projects using LangGraph, CrewAI, and AWS Bedrock for medical and educational niches.

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer

experiences.description:
• Led the transition to a microservices architecture using Django and FastAPI that improved deployment flexibility by 30% and reduced system dependencies.

• Built data processing pipelines with Apache Kafka that handled 2x traffic growth while maintaining consistent performance under load.

• Grew the engineering team from 6 to 12 members while introducing code quality metrics that reduced critical bugs in production by 40%.

• Implemented monitoring and observability solutions that improved incident detection, reducing average response time from 40 to 15 minutes.

• Added caching and load-balancing strategies that reduced database load by 50% during peak usage periods.

• Established CI/CD practices that shortened deployment cycles from weekly to twice-weekly releases while maintaining service reliability.
